{{CargoOrgan
|name=Whalelord Skull
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10694
|idx=52
|description=A majestic crown carved from the skull of the Stormwhale King, its surface sheathed in a shimmering crystal film. When worn, its sovereign aura bends the will of all who behold it.
|skill=Summon the Whale King's Skeleton, dealing DMG equal to 196% of ATK, and increase next round's Water DMG by 50%!
|hp=3290
|def=247
|atk=235
|rush=259
|gene1=In Snail Arena, DMG +12%
|gene2=In Snail Arena, CRIT +20%
|gene3=In Snail Arena, HIT +12%
|gene4=In Snail Arena, {race} ATK +100
|gene5=In Snail Arena, HIT +12%
|gene6=Snail Arena, ignore enemy DEF +4%
|gene7=Snail Arena, ignore enemy DEF +4% (Awakened)
|}}
